testcase.name: SLUG_FIELD_PATTERN matches slug with only lowercase letters

testcase.classname: SLUG_FIELD_PATTERN does not match slugs with uppercase letters
testcase.name: SLUG_FIELD_PATTERN does not match slugs with uppercase letters

testcase.classname: SLUG_FIELD_PATTERN does not match slugs with spaces

testcase.classname: handleDeletingResponse calls toastSuccess when status is 204 (SUCCESS)
testcase.name: handleDeletingResponse calls toastSuccess when status is 204 (SUCCESS)

testcase.classname: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with detail when title is NOT_FOUND
testcase.name: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with detail when title is NOT_FOUND

testcase.classname: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with detail when title is BAD_REQUEST
testcase.name: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with detail when title is BAD_REQUEST

testcase.classname: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with DELETE_FAILED for unknown responses
testcase.name: handleDeletingResponse calls toastError with DELETE_FAILED for unknown responses

testcase.classname: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastSuccess on status 204 (SUCCESS)
testcase.name: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastSuccess on status 204 (SUCCESS)

testcase.classname: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with detail on BAD_REQUEST title
testcase.name: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with detail on BAD_REQUEST title

testcase.classname: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with detail on NOT_FOUND title
testcase.name: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with detail on NOT_FOUND title

testcase.classname: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with UPDATE_FAILED as fallback
testcase.name: handleUpdatingResponse calls toastError with UPDATE_FAILED as fallback

testcase.classname: handleCreatingResponse calls toastSuccess on status 201 (CREATED)
testcase.name: handleCreatingResponse calls toastSuccess on status 201 (CREATED)

testcase.classname: handleCreatingResponse calls toastError with detail on status 400 (BAD_REQUEST)
testcase.name: handleCreatingResponse calls toastError with detail on status 400 (BAD_REQUEST)

testcase.classname: handleCreatingResponse calls toastError with CREATE_FAILED as fallback
testcase.name: handleCreatingResponse calls toastError with CREATE_FAILED as fallback

testcase.classname: handleResponse calls toastSuccess when response.ok is true
testcase.name: handleResponse calls toastSuccess when response.ok is true

testcase.classname: handleResponse calls toastError when response.ok is false
testcase.name: handleResponse calls toastError when response.ok is false

testcase.name: apiClientService.get calls fetch with the endpoint and undefined options

testcase.classname: apiClientService.get returns the fetch response object
testcase.name: apiClientService.get returns the fetch response object

testcase.name: apiClientService.post calls fetch with POST method and serialised body

testcase.classname: apiClientService.post sets the default Content-type header
testcase.name: apiClientService.post sets the default Content-type header

testcase.classname: apiClientService.post uses a custom contentType when provided
testcase.name: apiClientService.post uses a custom contentType when provided

testcase.classname: apiClientService.post removes Content-type header when body is FormData
testcase.name: apiClientService.post removes Content-type header when body is FormData

testcase.classname: apiClientService.put calls fetch with PUT method and body
testcase.name: apiClientService.put calls fetch with PUT method and body

testcase.classname: apiClientService.delete calls fetch with DELETE method
testcase.name: apiClientService.delete calls fetch with DELETE method

testcase.name: error handling re-throws when fetch rejects

testcase.classname: CORS redirect handling executes without error when response is cors and redirected
testcase.name: CORS redirect handling executes without error when response is cors and redirected

testcase.classname: CORS redirect handling does not attempt redirect when response type is basic
testcase.name: CORS redirect handling does not attempt redirect when response type is basic

testcase.classname: CORS redirect handling does not attempt redirect when cors but not redirected
testcase.name: CORS redirect handling does not attempt redirect when cors but not redirected
